[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Thorn''' was a [[Flight instructor/Legends|flight instructor]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. In [[24 ABY/Legends|24 ABY]], he taught [[Sirrakuk]] to fly a [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighter]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Delusions of Grandeur]]''
